Label: Selected Input
Notes: Display channel name on the switches
Hover help text in the status bar: Input Channel Number and Selection.
Keyboard shortcuts: Type I to switch to the Input Tab. Prompt in the status bar for 5 seconds to type a number and then return to select the corresponding input channel.

Label: Input Name
Hover help text in the status bar: Displayed Input Channel Name (editable).

Label: Map Lock
Notes: Per-input toggle on the tab header. Prevents accidental position edits from the Map tab. Lock does not prevent OSC or text-editor edits.
Hover help text in the status bar: Lock this object's position on the Map to prevent accidental drag edits.

Label: Map Visibility
Notes: Per-input toggle on the tab header. Shows or hides this input's marker on the Map tab.
Hover help text in the status bar: Show or hide this object on the Map.

Label: Set All Inputs
Notes: Long-press (2 seconds) on the tab header opens the Set All Inputs window (bulk edits to every input channel).
Hover help text in the status bar: Long-press to open the Set All Inputs window for bulk parameter changes.

Label: Attenuation
Hover help text in the status bar: Input Channel Attenuation.

Label: Delay/Latency comp.
Notes: Highlight "Latency Compensation" for negative values or "Delay" for positive values
OSC path optional value: extra value is transition time in seconds
Hover help text in the status bar: Input Channel Delay (positive values) or Latency Compensation (negative values).

Label: Minimal Latency
Hover help text in the status bar: Select between Acoustic Precedence and Minimal Latency for Amplification Precedence.

Label: Position X
Default: distribute in the middle of the stage in up to 8 rows of 8
Notes: Incremented or decremented by horizontal axis of JoystickXY if no tracking enabled (locally and globally) Greyed out and uneditable when tracking enabled.
OSC path optional value: extra value is transition time in seconds
Hover help text in the status bar: Object Position in Width. Nudge with Left and Right Arrow Keys.
Keyboard shortcuts: Left and Right Arrows to nudge to the left (--) or right (++) if inputTracking == 0 in 0.1m increments

Label: Position Y
Default: distribute in the middle of the stage in up to 8 rows of 8
Notes: Incremented or decremented by vertical axis of JoystickXY if no tracking enabled (locally and globally) Greyed out and uneditable when tracking enabled.
OSC path optional value: extra value is transition time in seconds
Hover help text in the status bar: Object Position in Depth. Nudge with Up and Down Arrow Keys.
Keyboard shortcuts: Up and Down Arrows to nudge to the upstage (++) or downstage (--) if inputTracking == 0 in 0.1m increments

Label: Position Z
Default: distribute in the middle of the stage in up to 8 rows of 8
Notes: Incremented or decremented by V slider with return to zero if no tracking enabled (locally and globally) Greyed out and uneditable when tracking enabled.
OSC path optional value: extra value is transition time in seconds
Hover help text in the status bar: Object Position in Height. Nudge with Page Up and Page Down Keys.
Keyboard shortcuts: Page Up and Page Down to nudge to the up (++) or down (--) if inputTracking == 0 in 0.1m increments

Label: Offset X
Notes: incremented or decremented by horizontal axis of JoystickXY if tracking enabled (locally and globally)
OSC path optional value: extra value is transition time in seconds
Hover help text in the status bar: Object Position Offset in Width. Adjusted when Tracking is Enabled.
Keyboard shortcuts: Left and Right Arrows to nudge to the left (--) or right (++) if inputTracking == 1 in 0.1m increments

Label: Offset Y
Notes: incremented or decremented by vertical axis of JoystickXY if tracking enabled (locally and globally)
OSC path optional value: extra value is transition time in seconds
Hover help text in the status bar: Object Position Offset in Depth. Adjusted when Tracking is Enabled.
Keyboard shortcuts: Up and Down Arrows to nudge to the upstage (++) or downstage (--) if inputTracking == 1 in 0.1m increments

Label: Offset Z
Notes: incremented or decremented by V slider with return to zero if tracking enabled (locally and globally)
OSC path optional value: extra value is transition time in seconds
Hover help text in the status bar: Object Position Offset in Height. Adjusted when Tracking is Enabled.
Keyboard shortcuts: Page Up and Page Down to nudge to the up (++) or down (--) if inputTracking == 1 in 0.1m increments

Label: Constraint X
Notes: Limit positionX to the bounds of the stage in width

Label: Constraint Y
Notes: Limit positionY to the bounds of the stage in depth
Hover help text in the status bar: Limit Position to the Bounds of the Stage in Depth.

Label: Constraint Z
Notes: Limit positionZ to the bounds of the stage in height
Hover help text in the status bar: Limit Position to the Bounds of the Stage in Height.

Label: Flip X
Notes: In calculations positionX will be symetrical to the origin, keyboard nudging will be inverted
Hover help text in the status bar: X will be Symetrical to the Origin. Keyboard Nudging will be Inverted.

Label: Flip Y
Notes: In calculations positionY will be symetrical to the origin, keyboard nudging will be inverted
Hover help text in the status bar: Y will be Symetrical to the Origin. Keyboard Nudging will be Inverted.

Label: Flip Z
Notes: In calculations positionZ will be symetrical to the origin, keyboard nudging will be inverted
Hover help text in the status bar: Z will be Symetrical to the Origin. Keyboard Nudging will be Inverted.

Label: Constraint Distance
Notes: Limit radial distance from origin (Cylindrical/Spherical modes)
Hover help text in the status bar: Enable Distance Constraint for Cylindrical/Spherical Coordinate Modes.

Label: Constraint Distance Min
Notes: /wfs/input/constraintDistanceMin
OSC path optional value: /remoteInput/constraintDistanceMin

Label: Constraint Distance Max
Notes: /wfs/input/constraintDistanceMax
OSC path optional value: /remoteInput/constraintDistanceMax

Label: Joystick XY
Notes: Adjusts inputPositionX and inputPositionY when inputTracking == 0; inputOffsetX and inputOffsetY otherwise.
Hover help text in the status bar: Adjusts Positions X and Y (or Offset if Tracking is Enabled).

Label: Joystick Z
Notes: Adjusts inputPositionZ when inputTracking == 0; inputOffsetZ otherwise.
Hover help text in the status bar: Adjusts Position Z (or Offset if Tracking is Enabled).

Label: Cluster
enum: Single; Cluster 1; Cluster 2; Cluster 3; Cluster 4; Cluster 5; Cluster 6; Cluster 7; Cluster 8; Cluster 9; Cluster 10
Hover help text in the status bar: Object is Part of a Cluster. Use number keys to Quickly assign Cluster.
Keyboard shortcuts: Assign cluster number with number keys 1>1; 2>2; … ; 9>9; 0>10; last key after the numbers > removes the cluster

Label: Tracking Active
Hover help text in the status bar: Enable or Disable Tracking for Object.

Label: Tracking ID
Notes: Greyed out but editable when trackingActive == 0
Hover help text in the status bar: Tracker ID for Object.

Label: Tracking Smoothing
Notes: Greyed out but editable when trackingActive == 0
Hover help text in the status bar: Tracking Position Smoothing Amount.

Label: Coordinate Mode
Notes: Display mode for position values
Hover help text in the status bar: Coordinate Display Mode: Cartesian (X/Y/Z), Cylindrical (radius/azimuth/height), or Spherical (radius/azimuth/elevation).

Label: Position Radius
enum: Virtual param - converts to X/Y internally
Notes: /wfs/input/positionR
OSC remote path: Distance from Origin in XY Plane (Cylindrical Coordinates).

Label: Position Azimuth
enum: Virtual param - converts to X/Y internally. 0°=audience, 90°=stage right
Notes: /wfs/input/positionTheta

Label: Offset Radius
enum: Virtual param - converts to Offset X/Y internally
Notes: /wfs/input/offsetR

Label: Offset Azimuth
enum: Virtual param - converts to Offset X/Y internally
Notes: /wfs/input/offsetTheta

Label: Position Radius 3D
enum: Virtual param - converts to X/Y/Z internally
Notes: /wfs/input/positionRsph
OSC remote path: Distance from Origin in 3D Space (Spherical Coordinates).

Label: Position Elevation
enum: Virtual param - converts to X/Y/Z internally. 0°=horizontal, 90°=up
Notes: /wfs/input/positionPhi
OSC remote path: Elevation Angle from Horizontal Plane (Spherical Coordinates).

Label: Offset Radius 3D
enum: Virtual param - converts to Offset X/Y/Z internally
Notes: /wfs/input/offsetRsph

Label: Offset Elevation
enum: Virtual param - converts to Offset X/Y/Z internally
Notes: /wfs/input/offsetPhi

Label: Set Position Y
Notes: Per set. Base position applied to every trigger from this Set.
Hover help text in the status bar: Base Set position in Depth.

Label: Set Position Z
Notes: Per set. Base position applied to every trigger from this Set.
Hover help text in the status bar: Base Set position in Height.

Label: Set Level
Notes: Per set. Set-level attenuation applied on top of per-cell attenuation.
OSC path optional value: extra value is transition time in seconds
Hover help text in the status bar: Set-level attenuation.

Label: Set Press Level Enabled
Notes: Per set. When ON, pad pressure modulates the Set level (ON by default).
Hover help text in the status bar: Enable pad-pressure to Set-level mapping.

Label: Set Press Level Dir
Notes: Per set. Positive = harder press -> louder. Negative = harder press -> quieter.
Hover help text in the status bar: Direction of the pressure-to-level mapping.

Label: Set Press Level Curve
Notes: Per set. Curve of the pressure response (0.5 = linear, <0.5 = concave, >0.5 = convex).
Hover help text in the status bar: Pressure-response curve for the Level mapping.

Label: Set Press Z Enabled
Notes: Per set. When ON, pad pressure modulates the cell's Z offset.
Hover help text in the status bar: Enable pad-pressure to Z-offset mapping.

Label: Set Press Z Dir
Notes: Per set. Positive = press -> up. Negative = press -> down.
Hover help text in the status bar: Direction of the pressure-to-Z mapping.

Label: Set Press Z Curve
Notes: Per set. Curve of the pressure response for Z.
Hover help text in the status bar: Pressure-response curve for the Z mapping.

Label: Set Press HF Enabled
Notes: Per set. When ON, pad pressure modulates the cell's HF shelf.
Hover help text in the status bar: Enable pad-pressure to HF-shelf mapping.

Label: Set Press HF Dir
Notes: Per set. Direction of the pressure-to-HF mapping.
Hover help text in the status bar: Direction of the pressure-to-HF mapping.

Label: Set Press HF Curve
Notes: Per set. Curve of the pressure response for HF.
Hover help text in the status bar: Pressure-response curve for the HF mapping.

Label: Set Press XY Enabled
Notes: Per set. When ON, XY deflection from the pad adjusts the input's X/Y position (ON by default).
Hover help text in the status bar: Enable pad XY-deflection to position mapping.

Label: Set Press XY Scale
Notes: Per set. Scale factor (m per update) applied to XY deflection. Matches the joystick default by default.
Hover help text in the status bar: Scale factor for the XY-deflection mapping (m per update).

Label: Add Set
Notes: Creates a new empty SamplerSet and selects it in the Set Selector.
Hover help text in the status bar: Create a new empty Sampler Set.

Label: Delete Set
Notes: Long-press deletes the currently-selected SamplerSet (with confirmation).
Hover help text in the status bar: Long-press to delete the currently-selected Set.

Label: Rename Set
Notes: Opens an inline editor to rename the currently-selected Set (writes to samplerSetName).
Hover help text in the status bar: Rename the currently-selected Set.

Label: QLab Set Export
Notes: Exports the currently-selected Set as a QLab cue sequence (requires a QLab target configured in Network).
Hover help text in the status bar: Export this Set as QLab cues.

Label: Lightpad Zone
Notes: Read-only. Displays which Lightpad zone this input currently occupies (hidden when no Lightpad is connected).
Hover help text in the status bar: Lightpad zone assigned to this input.

Label: Store Input Configuration
Notes: Store Input Configuration to file (make backup and show confirmation in the status bar)
Hover help text in the status bar: Store Input Configuration to file (overwrite with confirmation).

Label: Reload Input Configuration
Notes: Reload Input Configuration from file (confirmation in the status bar)
Hover help text in the status bar: Reload Input Configuration from file (with confirmation).

Label: Reload Input Config. Backup
Notes: Reload Input Configuration from backup file (confirmation in the status bar)
Hover help text in the status bar: Reload Input Configuration from backup file (with confirmation).

Label: Export Input Configuration
Notes: Store Input Configuration to file (with file explorer window)
Hover help text in the status bar: Store Input Configuration to file (with file explorer window).

Label: Import Input Configuration
Notes: Reload Input Configuration from file (with file explorer window)
Hover help text in the status bar: Reload Input Configuration from file (with file explorer window).

Label: Store NEW Input Snapshot
Notes: Store new Input Snapshot with single line text popup window for name (default date and time stamp) for all Inputs
Hover help text in the status bar: Store new Input Snapshot for All Objects.

Label: Select Input Snapshot
Notes: Populate when opening with Snapshot filenames. Select Input Snapshot without loading
Hover help text in the status bar: Select Input Snapshot Without Loading.

Label: Reload Input Snapshot
Notes: Reload selected Input Snapshot for all Inputs taking the scope into account
Hover help text in the status bar: Reload Selected Input Snapshot for All Objects Taking the Scope into Account.

Label: Update Input Snapshot
Notes: Update selected Input Snapshot with confirmation for all Inputs
Hover help text in the status bar: Update Selected Input Snapshot (with confirmation).

Label: Edit Input Snapshot Scope
Notes: Open selected Input Snapshot Scope window
Hover help text in the status bar: Open Selected Input Snapshot Scope Window.

Label: Delete Input Snapshot
Notes: Delete selected Input Snapshot with confirmation
Hover help text in the status bar: Delete Selected Input Snapshot With Confirmation.
